component.name: Soma Unreal GPU-P
component.summary: GPU-P launch integration for Asset Manager Studio engines

description.p: Adds Mesa DZN GPU-P launchers for native Linux Unreal Engine versions installed and managed with Asset Manager Studio.
Detect engines, create per-version desktop launchers, add custom engine directories, and verify the Hyper-V GPU-P Vulkan bridge.
Asset Manager Studio remains responsible for Epic authentication, engine downloads, projects, Fab, Quixel, assets, and plugins.
Replaces the engine selector with focused Asset Manager Studio GPU-P integration.
